# Scan2Call

Scan2Call is a privacy-first QR identity tag system that helps reunite lost items with their owners. It is a product of ZTEC Group Pty Ltd (ABN 82 697 931 445), Australia, and is developed by GrayVally Software Solutions.

## Key Facts
- Product: Scan2Call (QR identity tags and anonymous contact relay)
- Owner: ZTEC Group Pty Ltd (ABN 82 697 931 445), Australia
- Developer: GrayVally Software Solutions (https://grayvally.tech)
- Primary site: https://scan2call.com.au

## What Scan2Call Does
- Lets finders contact owners without revealing the owner's personal details
- Routes phone calls, SMS, and WhatsApp through an anonymous relay
- Works without any app for the person who finds the item
- The QR tag is the paid product and is active for a chosen term (1 to 5 years), with optional auto-renewal

## Pricing (AUD)
- Stickers and tags (Car, Luggage, Passport/Standard): $7.25 per year
- Medical ID Band: $14.49 per year
- Find My devices (Pet Collar, Keychain): $29.99 including the first year, then $7.25 per year to renew the QR
- Shipping: $5 flat within Australia, $10 flat worldwide

- Home: https://scan2call.com.au/

## Data & Privacy
- Data residency: Australia (Sydney, ap-southeast-2)
- Privacy policy: https://scan2call.com.au/privacy

## Contact
